hero_headline: 30 Years of Healing Expertise. Now It’s Time the Digital World Caught Up.
hero_subtitle: A comprehensive strategy to unify your fragmented online presence, establish AI visibility for your complex developmental trauma work, and position Ray Miller Healing as the definitive authority in somatic trauma resolution.
exec_summary_paragraphs:
You have been doing this work for 30 years. You have helped people with chronic pain, fibromyalgia, autoimmune conditions, and long COVID when nothing else worked. Your somatic approach to complex developmental trauma is so specialized that even other therapists sometimes don't fully understand what you do. And despite doing zero marketing, you have built a $22,000 per month practice through word of mouth alone. That says everything about the quality of your work.

But here is the challenge: your digital presence hasn't caught up with your clinical reputation. You have four separate domains splitting your authority (raymillerhealing.com, raythehealer.com, raymillertraumahealing.com, and raymillerpainrelief.com). Your NPI record has the wrong address. Your Vagaro listing describes you as a massage therapist, which confuses Google about what you actually do. And your website, as you described it yourself, doesn't really represent who you are or what you do anymore.

The exciting part is that you are sitting on a tremendous amount of raw material: 30 years of experience, powerful client testimonials scattered across different domains, a book in editing, 15 podcast appearances being booked, multiple certifications including Somatic Experiencing and Functional Diagnostic Nutrition, and a niche (somatic trauma resolution for chronic conditions) that very few practitioners occupy. These are exactly the ingredients AI systems look for when deciding who to recommend.

With your book launch on the horizon and the shift toward AI-powered search already here, now is the moment to consolidate everything under one unified brand, build the digital foundation that matches your clinical authority, and make sure that when someone in New Jersey asks ChatGPT or Google for help with chronic pain and trauma, Ray Miller Healing is the answer they get.
credibility_findings:
🔴

Four separate domains are splitting your authority across the internet. Google sees raymillerhealing.com, raythehealer.com, raymillertraumahealing.com, and raymillerpainrelief.com as four different entities. Instead of one powerful presence, your credibility is divided four ways. This is the single biggest issue holding you back from AI visibility.

🔴

NPI record shows the wrong address and outdated information. Your NPI listing does not match your current Montclair practice address. This stale data cascades into other platforms and directories, creating inconsistency that erodes Google's trust in your entity.

⚠️

Vagaro and other listings label you as a "massage therapist." While bodywork is part of your background, this label creates confusion for AI systems. When someone searches for somatic trauma therapy, Google sees "massage therapist" and sends them elsewhere. We need to reposition your entity around your actual specialty.

⚠️

Using a free Gmail account instead of Google Workspace. Bots never pay for email. A paid Workspace account tied to your domain signals to Google that a real business operates behind the website. This is a quick win with outsized impact on entity trust.

⚠️

LinkedIn profile still shows "Evolution PXP" as your business. Previous business names and outdated profiles continue to fragment your identity across the web, adding noise to an already complex entity picture.

✅

Multiple certifications provide strong credential depth. Somatic Experiencing Practitioner, Functional Diagnostic Nutrition Practitioner, and CMT credentials give you a uniquely multi-disciplinary profile. Once properly verified and connected, these become powerful trust signals.
optimization_findings:
🔴

Website reads like a landing page with no depth for AI. The current site is designed to get someone to call, but it lacks the content depth that Google and AI need to rank you. There are no dedicated service pages, no FAQ sections, and no structured information about your specialties, modalities, or approach.

🔴

No dedicated pages for individual specialties. Complex developmental trauma, chronic pain relief, somatic experiencing, autoimmune recovery, long COVID support, and PTSD resolution each deserve their own page. Without them, AI has nothing to cite when someone searches for these services in your area.

🔴

No schema markup detected. Schema is the structured code that AI reads like a database. Without it, Google and AI are guessing about what your pages mean instead of knowing with certainty.

⚠️

Bio section is minimal. A brief paragraph about your experience is not enough. AI systems look for a structured bio page with verifiable credentials, NPI links, certification verification, education details, and professional association memberships.

⚠️

Website does not reflect your evolved practice. As you told us on the call, the current site "doesn't really represent who I am or what I do anymore." Your work has evolved significantly from pain relief to complex developmental trauma, but the website hasn't followed.
reputation_findings:
✅

Powerful client testimonials exist but live on the wrong domain. The testimonials on raythehealer.com are exceptional. Clients describe transformative experiences with your work. But Google gives raymillerhealing.com zero credit for content on a completely different domain. These need to be consolidated.

✅

Book in editing is a massive authority asset. Once published, your book becomes the ultimate credibility signal. AI systems weight published authors heavily in expertise rankings. The timing of your book launch and this campaign could not be better aligned.

✅

15 podcast appearances being booked. Each podcast episode becomes a citable piece of content that AI systems can reference. This is exactly the kind of third-party validation that builds authority.

⚠️

Minimal social media presence. Instagram and Facebook exist but are largely inactive. Google crawls social profiles and uses their activity as a signal of legitimacy. An interconnected network of active social profiles is essential for entity verification.

⚠️

No professional endorsements visible on primary site. Peer endorsements from other somatic practitioners, trauma specialists, or referring physicians would add a powerful layer of third-party validation that AI systems trust deeply.
engagement_findings:
⚠️

Hero section lacks emotional resonance. People who find you are usually in significant pain, physically and emotionally. The first thing they see on your website should make them feel like "Ray gets me." Right now, the hero section focuses on service categories rather than connecting with their experience.

⚠️

Call to action needs to be more specific. "Ask about availability" is generic. Something like "Book a Free 15-Minute Discovery Call" or "Start Your Healing Journey" creates more urgency and reduces friction.

⚠️

No trust signals above the fold. Your 30 years of experience, certifications, and upcoming book should be visible the moment someone lands on the page. Association logos, credential badges, and years of experience build instant confidence before they even scroll.

✅

Clear contact information and booking flow. The phone number is prominent and the path to contact is straightforward. This is a solid foundation to build on with better emotional messaging and conversion elements.
strategy_intro: Every action below maps directly to the gaps we identified. The CORE framework ensures nothing is left to chance. Here is exactly what we will do for Ray Miller Healing.
strategy_cards:
🔐 Credibility: One Entity, One Authority

We will consolidate your fragmented online presence into a single, powerful entity under raymillerhealing.com. This means resolving the four competing domains (we will implement proper redirects from the others), correcting your NPI record with your current Montclair address, reclaiming and updating directory listings that still describe you as a massage therapist, and building 15+ new citations with consistent NAP data across all major platforms. We will set up DNS records (DKIM and DMARC) for email security and recommend transitioning to Google Workspace. We will also build an interconnected network of social profiles (YouTube, LinkedIn, Facebook, Quora, Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest, and X) all linking back to your primary brand, creating a real human fingerprint that establishes you as a verified entity.

🔍 Optimization: Teach AI What You Actually Do

We will build up to five dedicated service pages for your core specialties: complex developmental trauma, chronic pain relief through somatic work, autoimmune and long COVID recovery, somatic experiencing therapy, and PTSD/trauma resolution. Each page gets custom HTML, proper schema markup, and FAQ sections based on what people in the Montclair/NJ area are actually searching for. We will also build a comprehensive bio page with your full credential stack (SEP, FDN-P, CMT), NPI verification link, 30 years of experience, and links to your upcoming book and podcast appearances. When someone asks ChatGPT "who can help me with chronic pain from developmental trauma in NJ," we want your page to be the answer.

⭐ Reputation: Amplify What Already Exists

You have incredible raw material: powerful client testimonials (currently trapped on raythehealer.com), a book about to launch, 15 podcast appearances in the pipeline, and 30 years of client results. We will consolidate your testimonials onto your primary site, help you collect professional endorsements from somatic practitioners and referring physicians, then distribute everything across GBP, Facebook, LinkedIn, Quora, and YouTube slideshow videos. A press release will be syndicated across 500+ news sites at campaign launch. As your book and podcasts go live, we will create a dedicated media page and integrate them into your entity signal.

🚀 Engagement: Convert Pain Into Booked Calls

We will redesign your hero section to lead with an emotionally compelling statement that speaks directly to the experience of living with chronic pain and unresolved trauma. Below that, a clear explanation of your somatic approach and a specific CTA like "Book a Free 15-Minute Discovery Call." We will add trust signals above the fold (credentials, 30 years of experience, association logos) and ensure every page has a frictionless path from landing to booking. We will also build a landing page optimized for your podcast appearances, so when listeners go to learn more, they land on a page designed to capture leads and convert.
strategy_roi_callout:
Why the Timing Is Perfect

Your book launch, podcast tour, and this digital strategy are converging at exactly the right moment. Google is shifting to conversational AI search, and practitioners who have clean entity signals, structured content, and verified credentials will be the only ones that show up. With your 30 years of experience and the niche you occupy (somatic developmental trauma for chronic conditions), you have an opportunity to own a space that very few others can credibly claim.
timeline_items:
Months 1-2: Foundation

Audit, Entity Cleanup, and Content Build

Deep-dive technical audit across all four domains. Domain consolidation strategy with redirects. NPI record correction. GBP optimization (resolving massage therapist categorization). Begin building 5 dedicated service pages with custom HTML, schema markup, and FAQ sections. Bio page buildout with full credential verification. Press release drafted. Citation and directory listing campaign initiated. Social profile buildout begins. Hero section redesign for conversion.

Month 3: Build and Launch

Pages Live, Citations Active, Socials Connected

Service pages finalized and published. Press release syndicated across 500+ news sites. Directory listings completed across 15+ platforms plus data aggregators. Social profiles connected and linked to GBP. Schema implementation complete. Entity Veracity Hub launch. NEO unique image placement on target pages. Podcast landing page built and optimized for your upcoming appearances.

Months 4-12: Amplify and Grow

Ongoing Strategy, Book Launch Support, and Visibility Growth

Rising Tide social content distribution activated (2 posts bi-weekly across GBP, Facebook, LinkedIn, and Quora). NEO image distribution across high-authority network. LiveDrive local signal strategy activated. Endorsement collection strategy ongoing. Monthly reporting with GSC, GA4, and GBP performance data. Book launch integration (media page, schema updates, Amazon listing connection). Podcast episode integration as they go live. Continuous optimization based on performance data.
